query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.role, u.isActive as user_active,
       s.id as salesperson_id, s.isActive as salesperson_active, s.updatedAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN salespersons s ON u.id = s.userId
WHERE u.id = 15362125;
